result.stdout:
Usage: AzureDatabaseTools <Command>

Commands:
  clone      
  export     
  help       Display help.
  version    Display version.

commands.payload:
Usage: AzureDatabaseTools <Command>

Commands:
  clone      
  export     
  help       Display help.
  version    Display version.

result.stdout:
Usage: clone [options...]

Options:
  -v, --verbosity <String>                       Sets the minimum level used by the Microsoft logging framework. Supported values are Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, Error and Critical.  (Default: Information)
  -e, --environment-name <String>                Environment name used by your application, where the connection string from the upstream database can be found. (Default: null)
  -d, --development-environment-name <String>    Environment name used by your application for local development. (Default: Development)
  -c, --configuration-section <String>           Section name where the database connection string can be found within the appsettings file. To represent JSON nesting, use colon (:) as a separator. (Default: ConnectionStrings:Default)
